thoughts: Biting my lip... thinking about him
Mr. Grey has such... demanding standards
Is it warm in here or is it just me?
Trying to focus but my mind keeps wandering...
He said I was capable. I want to be more than capable.
He's so... intense. I can't breathe when he looks at me like that.
Why do I blush every time he messages?
Code is compiling... like my thoughts about him
Organizing his world, one task at a time
Wonder if he knows how much I think about him...
That look he gives me... you know the one
Fifty shades of... wait, no, focus Anastasia
Trying to be professional but he's so... distracting
My heart does this weird fluttery thing
He probably doesn't even notice me staring
Wait, did I just say that out loud?
So much to do, so much to prove... for him
Is it weird that I find his competence... attractive?
Breathe, Steele. Breathe.
He trusts me with everything. I won't let him down.
